dialogs.script:
say: Hope the tour was helpful, {player}!
say: Remember — Route 1 is to the north, Oak's Lab is to the south-east!

say: Hi there, {player}! Welcome to Pallet Town!
say: It's a small town, but there's plenty to see.
choice: Would you like me to show you around?
escortnpc
say: Great! Follow me closely, {player}!
movenpc: 15 8
say: Here we are — this is your Rival's house!
say: He's always one step ahead, so watch out for him!
movenpc: 20 8
movenpc: 20 14
movenpc: 16 14
say: And this is Professor Oak's Lab!
say: The Professor studies Pokémon from all over the world.
say: If you ever need guidance, he's the one to see!
movenpc: 12 14
movenpc: 12 2
say: Finally, just up here is the exit to Route 1.
say: Head north when you feel ready to begin your adventure!
say: That's the full tour, {player}. Good luck out there!
stopescort
movenpc: 8 2
movenpc: 8 8
setflag: tour_complete
